birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Its range is restricted to northern Kenya where it is found in two disjunct populations: One population is located north of Marsabit, in the Didi Galgalla desert, a region marked by plains of rocky, red lava soils and patches of short-grass and bushes. The other inhabits a particular area (elevated between 600 m and 1,350 m) lying between Isiolo and Garba Tula
